title: Carry out custom painting techniques to vehicle body panels
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out custom painting techniques to vehicle body panels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to carry out custom painting on vehicle body panels

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret painting information1.3 Access and interpret custom design specifications1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Identify and check design stencils, painting equipment, and materials for quality and serviceability1.6 Prepare work plan to identify custom painting application methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret painting information1.3 Access and interpret custom design specifications1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Identify and check design stencils, painting equipment, and materials for quality and serviceability1.6 Prepare work plan to identify custom painting application methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret painting information1.3 Access and interpret custom design specifications1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Identify and check design stencils, painting equipment, and materials for quality and serviceability1.6 Prepare work plan to identify custom painting application methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to carry out custom painting on vehicle body panels

elements.title: Determine custom design

pcs.text: Select custom paint design, layout and colour according to workplace instructions, design specifications, and customer order2.2 Develop and refine draft design to customer requirements2.3 Confirm approved custom graphic design with customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select custom paint design, layout and colour according to workplace instructions, design specifications, and customer order2.2 Develop and refine draft design to customer requirements2.3 Confirm approved custom graphic design with customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select custom paint design, layout and colour according to workplace instructions, design specifications, and customer order2.2 Develop and refine draft design to customer requirements2.3 Confirm approved custom graphic design with customer.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine custom design

elements.title: Prepare design templates and stencils

pcs.text: Prepare design stencils and templates based on design and shape specifications and check against workplace instructions3.2 Apply design to stencils3.3 Cut out stencils using selected tools according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare design stencils and templates based on design and shape specifications and check against workplace instructions3.2 Apply design to stencils3.3 Cut out stencils using selected tools according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare design stencils and templates based on design and shape specifications and check against workplace instructions3.2 Apply design to stencils3.3 Cut out stencils using selected tools according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare design templates and stencils

elements.title: Mix and apply paint to create a variety of different visual effects

pcs.text: Prepare substrate for the application of custom paint finishes4.2 Select colour combinations and equipment required to produce various painting effects to reproduce the custom painting design4.3 Mix paint colours and apply tonal order to replicate custom design4.4 Produce lines, shapes, patterns and illustrations using freehand techniques with the assistance of stencils4.5 Identify required backgrounds, colour combinations, and effective colours and apply special effects to produce custom illustrations and graphics4.6 Produce visual texture, and light and shade, on the given design or subject matter according to customer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare substrate for the application of custom paint finishes4.2 Select colour combinations and equipment required to produce various painting effects to reproduce the custom painting design4.3 Mix paint colours and apply tonal order to replicate custom design4.4 Produce lines, shapes, patterns and illustrations using freehand techniques with the assistance of stencils4.5 Identify required backgrounds, colour combinations, and effective colours and apply special effects to produce custom illustrations and graphics4.6 Produce visual texture, and light and shade, on the given design or subject matter according to customer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare substrate for the application of custom paint finishes4.2 Select colour combinations and equipment required to produce various painting effects to reproduce the custom painting design4.3 Mix paint colours and apply tonal order to replicate custom design4.4 Produce lines, shapes, patterns and illustrations using freehand techniques with the assistance of stencils4.5 Identify required backgrounds, colour combinations, and effective colours and apply special effects to produce custom illustrations and graphics4.6 Produce visual texture, and light and shade, on the given design or subject matter according to customer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Mix and apply paint to create a variety of different visual effects

elements.title: Prepare and apply clear topcoat

pcs.text: Prepare painted surface for clear topcoat finish using solvent cleaners and tack rags5.2 Mix and apply refinishing clear topcoat materials without causing damage to vehicle, systems or components

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare painted surface for clear topcoat finish using solvent cleaners and tack rags5.2 Mix and apply refinishing clear topcoat materials without causing damage to vehicle, systems or components.
